---
title: "Session 8: Hands-on: LLM Classification & Prompt Iteration"
subtitle: "Day 3 · Prompt Design & Iteration (3-2)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 8: Hands-on: LLM Classification & Prompt Iteration

## 📋 Agenda

- Run LLM-based text classification in Colab
- Evaluate the outputs with the prepared tools
- Get your Gemini API key

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Run classification in Colab

## Run classification in Colab

<!-- to be added -->

# Evaluate the outputs

## Evaluate the outputs

<!-- to be added -->

# Your Gemini API key

## Your Gemini API key

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
